features.name: Wall Walking
features.description: Move on walls and ceilings at normal speed, defying gravity.

features.name: Burrowing
features.description: Move through earth, sand, or loose rock at half speed, creating temporary tunnels.

features.name: Swinging
features.description: Move on any solid surface. +1 sp at Tiers 1-6 then +2 sp at Tiers 7+.

features.name: Super Jump
features.description: Jump up to your full movement speed in one leap. +1 sp at Tiers 1-6 then +2 sp at Tiers 7+.

features.name: Flight
features.description: Move in any direction at full speed with perfect maneuverability.

features.name: Phasing
features.description: Selectively phase through solid barriers at normal speed.

features.name: Short-Range Teleportation
features.description: Instantly teleport to any visible location within your movement range.

features.name: Portal Creation
features.description: Create two linked portals as part of your movement action that persist until the start of your next turn.
